notes_zh:
- **新增** 备份/导入现在同时覆盖分组和自动化规则（此前仅备份剪贴板条目）
- **新增** 接力：循环粘贴开关，重新打开时不再残留队列状态
- **新增** 接力：「允许重复复制」开关，连续相邻重复不再被过滤
- **新增** 接力：可配置完成提示音（默认 Pop，可静音）
- **新增** 接力：横幅可点击清除规则，右键切换规则
- **新增** 接力：队列 imageData/快照持久化，退出重开不丢失
- **新增** 富文本直通：复制内容在 Word / 邮件 / 浏览器里都保留原生排版
- **修复** 接力：接受 `.file` 及所有文件类条目入队
- **修复** Finder 复制的图片文件作为内嵌图片粘贴
- **修复** 富文本条目隐藏编辑按钮，防止静默丢失格式
- **修复** 侧边栏类型列表不再显示 `.mixed`
- **优化** 「立即备份」不再卡顿 UI，大数据量下显示清晰进度条
notes_en:
- **New** Backup & import now include groups and automation rules (previously only clipboard items)
- **New** Relay: loop toggle; no more stale queue state on reopen
- **New** Relay: "allow duplicate copies" toggle
- **New** Relay: configurable completion sound (default Pop, with mute option)
- **New** Relay: banner is clickable to clear the rule; right-click to switch
- **New** Relay: queue persists imageData/snapshots across app restarts
- **New** Native-fidelity rich-text passthrough — copied content keeps full formatting in Word, Mail, browsers
- **Fix** Relay accepts `.file` and other file-based clips into the queue
- **Fix** Finder-copied image files paste as embedded images
- **Fix** Rich-text items hide the edit button to prevent silent format loss
- **Fix** Sidebar type list no longer shows `.mixed`
- **Improve** Backup Now no longer freezes the UI on large libraries; shows a clear progress indicator
